comment: Sync-bus heartbeat. Each node updates its entry on every push. See .sync/BUS.md.

claude-local.focus: Launch-quantized seeking shipped (spec 1.7.4): seeks queue + splice ON the next grid boundary w/ 3ms crossfade (Ableton-style), blinking cue marker. Fixes mid-beat jump feel user reported. Needs user listen-test. Open: STR001 genre/buy/donate URLs.
